hooks.command: bash -c 'file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *NHSOdsTools.cs ]]; then echo "[hook] Editing tools file — ensure [McpServerTool] and [Description] are present on every new method"; fi'
bash -c 'file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.cs ]]; then echo "[hook] C# file modified: $file — run dotnet build to verify"; fi'
